summary_one_line: Input must carry a structured cmap subtable whose u.format field is non-zero (e.g. 12 or 14), bypassing the format-0 case arm.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A well-formed cmap table whose CmapSubtable.u.format 16-bit field decodes to a non-zero format selector (12 or 14), so the switch at line 1352 skips `case 0` and reaches the default/case-14 arm — i.e. the false side of the format-0 branch. This requires the structured cmap header bytes (sfnt header, 'cmap' tag, subtable offset, format word) to all sanitize and steer u.format away from 0.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile_cmplog seeds begin with a clean sfnt/cmap header (`00 01 00 00 ... cmap`, the `ttlf` table directory entry) and carry format selectors 0x0c (12) and 0x04-context bytes; the per-role overlay shows the winner takes the case-14/default arm (lines 1359-1360 marked [W]) and never enters format0 (W hits=0 there), and resolves the branch 10/10 with 41919 hits.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile seeds are short (13-68 byte) unstructured buffers whose first bytes are random (e0/4c/f1...), so the subtable that sanitizes decodes u.format=0 and execution falls into `case 0: u.format0.get_glyph` (line 1353 marked [L], format0 entry hit 1240 times by L, 0 by W); the loser blocks 10/10 and never reaches the false side.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace: the CmpLogObserver records the comparison of the parsed u.format word against the literal case constants (12/14) and the I2S mutator substitutes a matching format selector into the exact input offset, snapping the format word off 0. Plain value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace and only gets a CMP_MAP Hamming-distance bucket, which gives no direct byte-placement to satisfy the discrete switch constant.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the false side of a switch on the cmap subtable format field; case 0 is the true/blocked arm.
The decisive pair is value_profile_cmplog over value_profile with an I2S technique delta and perfect separation.
The winner resolves the branch every trial while the loser blocks every trial.
The winner takes the case-14 / default arm (false side) which the loser never reaches.
The loser takes the format-0 case arm (the blocked true side).
The loser exclusively invokes format0 get_glyph (1240 times) while the winner never does.
Winner seeds carry a structured sfnt/cmap header with a recognizable table directory.
Loser seeds are short unstructured buffers with random leading bytes.
value_profile_cmplog has the I2SRandReplace mutator that plain value_profile lacks.
Plain value_profile explicitly has no I2SRandReplace mutator, only havoc and CMP_MAP feedback.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 5401 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 2cd766ba50495565` and observed an I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 43 of the 44-level ancestor chain; tool reported '1 ancestor dash row(s) at depth 43'.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness with the same format switch where value_profile_cmplog and value_profile resolve the non-zero-format branch at statistically indistinguishable rates, showing the discrete format-selector constant does not require I2S substitution.

weakest_evidence_point: The exact non-zero format value the winner lands on (12 vs 14) is inferred from the case-14/default [W] overlay and the 0x0c header byte rather than directly observed at the u.format decode site.
